text.title: Multi-Region Active-Active Pattern Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when multi-region-active-active-pattern is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Conflict policy is 'whoever wrote last' chosen by default; user updates silently overwritten.
antipattern.reason: Default LWW masked the policy decision.
antipattern.note: Fix: Document policy per data class; force review at design time.

antipattern.description: Failover drill skipped 3 quarters; real failover takes 4× expected time.
antipattern.note: Fix: Bake drill into OKRs; quarterly recurring calendar.

antipattern.description: EU user routed to US region during failover; residency breach.
antipattern.note: Fix: Residency-aware DNS / LB; explicit deny on non-allowed region per user class.
